description: Construction of a new secured parking lot. No building structures are proposed on the site. Only flatwork, gates, fencing, & electrical. Please note that the property is located at 977 Florida Boulevard NOLA 70124. Please note that the property is located at 977 Florida Boulevard NOLA 70124. Please note that the property is located at 977 Florida Boulevard NOLA 70124. 977 Florida Boulevard did not show up in the pulldown menu. Permit has been relocated to the address 5750 Orleans Ave. -JT

The move of the modular building was done under Permit #21-25670-TOVR and the permit was issued (see attached). In 2022 to an application for a renovation permit (Ref Code:P0RPHN) was filed for the building but the property owner (not GSS) didn’t have the funds to complete the work. Renovation permit (ref code: 1Y5NNR) was submitted in January but was denied because Jay considers the work to be new construction because the building was moved from one location to another. We are filing for a new construction permit to renovate the building and ensure building code life safety compliance for future use at its current location.
